hero.title: Your Origin Story, Validated by the World.
hero.subtitle: Blockchain, Traceability and Specialty Marketing for Cocoa and Coffee Producers looking to differentiate their brand.

stepper.title: A Journey of Transparency
stepper.subtitle: Every bean has a story. We make it immutable, visible and profitable in 5 steps.

modules.title: Everything your Brand Needs, in one place.
modules.m1_desc: Connect directly with importers, roasters and buyers without opaque intermediaries. Your product, your price, your narrative.
modules.m2_desc: Each transformation generates a blockchain hash. Your batch's authenticity is mathematically unquestionable.
modules.m3_desc: Design interactive SCA Flavor Wheels and turn cupping notes into a visual experience for the consumer.
modules.m4_desc: Record professional cupping scores. Validate each batch's excellence before hitting the market.
modules.m5_desc: Digitize raw material entry in real-time. Fair payment, verified origin and traceability from the first weighing.
modules.m6_desc: Register your Farms and Benefit Centers with GPS coordinates, altitude, variety and EUDR validation polygons.
modules.m7_desc: A personalized Landing Page with your unique subdomain, catalog, story and direct sales chat. Free for all users.
modules.m8_desc: Smart QR ready for Sunrise 2027. A single scan delivers the full story, certifications and flavor notes.
modules.m9_desc: Total control over production transformations: stage yields, costs per kg and real-time profitability analysis.

widgets.label: Omnichannel
widgets.title: Bring the Flavor Wheel to your own store.
widgets.desc: Selling on Shopify or WooCommerce? Improve your conversion by letting your customers explore the sensory profile of your coffee without leaving your site.
